tools.name: createDelegationProfile
tools.description: Create a delegation profile defining who can act on behalf of whom and with what permissions.

tools.name: getDelegationProfile
tools.description: Get a delegation profile by ID with full details.

tools.name: setEscalationRules
tools.description: Set escalation rules for a delegation profile defining when to escalate back to the delegator.

tools.name: activateDelegation
tools.description: Activate a delegation profile to start the delegation period.

tools.name: deactivateDelegation
tools.description: Deactivate a delegation profile to end the delegation period.

tools.name: getDelegationStatus
tools.description: Get the current status and statistics for a delegation profile.

tools.name: listActiveDelegations
tools.description: List all currently active delegations in the organization.

tools.name: getHandoffBriefing
tools.description: Get a handoff briefing summarizing pending actions, recent activity, and upcoming deadlines.

tools.name: logActivity
tools.description: Log an activity performed under a delegation profile.

tools.name: getActivityLog
tools.description: Get the activity log for a delegation profile with optional date filtering.

tools.name: getDelegationSummary
tools.description: Get a summary report of delegation activity over a time period.
